overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a distinctive red jacket walking along a cobblestone waterfront promenade at night. The scene transitions from a dry, sheltered underpass to an open area where heavy rain begins to fall, with the character continuing through the downpour past fountains and other pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass along the cobblestone waterfront path

entered.detail: large concrete bridge or overpass creating a covered tunnel effect
wet-look cobblestone pavement running along the waterfront
ornate black metal railing separating the path from the water
classic black lamppost with glowing light fixture
tropical palm trees visible beyond the railing
plain concrete wall of adjacent building with small windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a large concrete overpass along a cobblestone waterfront promenade. The area is sheltered from weather, illuminated by artificial street lamps, with palm trees visible in the distance beyond the metal railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with autumn tree line

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open waterfront area with visible night sky
mist and fog begin rolling in from the waterfront, reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open promenade with modern buildings visible on the left

entered.detail: dark night sky visible overhead after exiting the overpass
tall contemporary building with illuminated windows and glass facade
trees with orange and brown autumn foliage lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into an open waterfront promenade. Modern glass buildings rise on the left while autumn trees line the path. As the character walks, fog begins rolling in from the water, signaling an approaching weather change.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy waterfront park with illuminated fountains

events.description: heavy rain begins falling, creating wet reflective surfaces and reducing visibility
approaching plaza area with illuminated water fountains becoming visible through the rain

agents.ego_description: walking through heavy rain with the red jacket becoming visibly wet, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple coat walking in the rain, passing by the character
pedestrian in yellow jacket crossing the cobblestone path ahead

entered.detail: illuminated red digital sign displaying advertisements
multiple illuminated water jets shooting up from the plaza ground
wooden park benches arranged along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Heavy rain falls as the character continues through the waterfront park. The cobblestones become wet and reflective under the street lamps. Other pedestrians appear walking through the rain. The character passes digital billboards and approaches a plaza with illuminated water fountains visible through the downpour.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a cobblestone waterfront promenade that transforms from a sheltered urban underpass into a rain-drenched public plaza. It begins beneath a large concrete overpass illuminated by artificial street lamps, with palm trees visible in the distance beyond a metal railing. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene opens up to reveal modern glass buildings and autumn trees while a thick fog begins rolling in from the water. The environment then shifts as heavy rain descends, turning the cobblestones wet and reflective under the city lights. Finally, the camera follows the character past digital billboards and other pedestrians, moving through the downpour toward a plaza with illuminated water fountains.
